Meryl
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
I came to visit the
St. Regis Hotel.
This is a hotel with an elegant atmosphere that has also been used for film shoots in the past.
This atmosphere seems just right for
his tastes.
Oh,
Detective. Have you found my daughter?
No, not yet.
I'm sorry.
Phew.
Hmm.
I don't really care, though.
Oh, you're back again?

The beautifully displayed room is filled with the scent of alcohol.
This is the suite at St. Reginus. On the long couch in front, a comfortably drunken
man is sprawled out.
As long as there are shoots in New York, this will be
like a home for him.
He seems to be still drowning in alcohol. I wonder if his body is okay.
I'm worried about him, even though I shouldn't be.
He seems less drunk than when I last saw him, and his words seem clearer.
Seeing him like this, even a beauty would think it's a waste.
Hey, why can’t we find my daughter?
Actually, I still haven’t been able to meet the midwife.
Midwife? You can’t meet her?
Yeah. Ever since I made the request, she has been out every time I visited.
Phew.
Well, that's a problem.
Detectives can actually be quite good-looking. I thought he was useless when I hadn’t heard from him for so long.
But I forgot to give him my contact information. What a mess.
Did you talk about that?
How was it? I don't really remember the last time well. But you know, Martin told me afterward.
I see.
I’m sorry, I’ve been a bit off lately.
Trying to drink away my worries is such a cheap thing to do.
I’ve been wanting to ask you something.
What is it?
Have you ever investigated your daughter's whereabouts until now?
No, I haven’t. So why now, you ask?
Yeah, that's right.
It's a very personal reason. I don't think you need to know.
All I need is for you to find my daughter.
Certainly, an outsider like me has no right to know about your privacy.
That's true.
But if your daughter can't be happy meeting you, I want to abandon this request.
Abandon the request, you say!? What do you mean by that? You think a daughter can be unhappy meeting her birth mother?
Do you really think so? We've been living apart for 16 years, you know?
Time can heal the bonds of blood.
If that's the case, I won't say anything more.
Well, your daughter might be on cloud nine right now. But I need her now!
Right now, I need a family member to heal me.
How's the filming going?
Well...
? I can't focus on that right now.
Um...
Could it be that you're still filming?
There's no way I can go in this state, right? That's not your concern.
I'll go shoot if I feel like it.
You have no idea where Cindy is, do you?
Why do I need to know where some talent is?
Yes, that's true.
That's none of your business.
It's true. I'm not her agent.
You should just ask that Chinese woman named Gloria.
You're taking on another request even though you can't handle mine?
No, that's not the case.
I hope that's true.
Before you worry about others, bring my daughter to me.
Hey, you're visiting Martin, right? You can just ignore any messages for me.
Hah.
What a disinterested response.
Just leave Martin alone, it's his own fault.
His own fault? Did something happen?
What do you mean, did something happen?
Oh dear, I unintentionally became vulgar.
Ugh, I'm feeling down.
You know, while I’m his girlfriend, Martin is captivated by other performers. Ugh, I can't forgive that!
You can't be talking about that person.
It has to be Jennifer.
I don't even want to see Martin's face.
Excuse me for asking, but you don’t know where Guy is, do you?
Of course not. You know what you’re saying, right?
Yes, I’m sane.
I hardly know that guy, yet...
Hey? You're acting strange.
Wouldn't it make sense to ask Martin or his fiancée?
Don't mention that woman's name in front of me!
That woman knows I'm Martin’s girlfriend and still flirted with him right in front of me!
I can’t speak to it since I wasn’t there.
Wasn’t it just your imagination?
What, you think my eyes are lying?
No, it's not like that.
Well, we’re women, so we can understand that much.
That woman is trying to make a move on Martin. Even though I know it’s impossible, I can’t help but feel uneasy.
Director Fabar...
does seem devoted.
Do you really think so? It’s fine with me whichever he chooses, but I just can’t stand that woman is using flirtation to take Martin from me.
I’m done with her already.
Let’s not talk about that woman anymore.
Is the reason for searching for his daughter to fill the void in his heart after losing the director? If so, I feel sorry for her.
Maybe,
he might be quite a selfish person.
If he decided to search for his daughter due to some circumstances, what are those circumstances that make him need her?
Looking at the situation, we should keep the matter of finding Cindy a secret.
Is he always like this?
Drinking champagne all day long,
it's no surprise if he ends up ruining his health.
He doesn't seriously think he can die young while still beautiful, does he?
Looking at the situation, we should keep the matter of finding Cindy a secret.
I wonder where Cindy is and what she’s doing right now.
It seems like the worst case isn’t likely, but if I don't find her, it will affect my credibility.
It’s a troublesome situation.
Even if you only half-listen to what she's saying, if an attractive woman like Jennifer comes on to you, you wouldn't feel bad about it.
Is the director planning to switch over to Jennifer?
Is the director captivated by Jennifer?
Seeing Meryl in such a state makes it seem possible.
Is Director Fabar going to leave her like this?
Being soaked in alcohol might be a daily thing for her,
but he must at least be attentive as a boyfriend.
Having such a boyfriend, it's going to be a tough road for the director.
Speaking of Guy,
is it misplaced to ask about him?
What is Guy doing at this busy time?
Is he trying to take the director away?
But would Jennifer actually do something like that?
At the party, Jennifer seemed to have a pure heart,
but there are many bad rumors about her.
The person known as Jennifer is hard to pin down.
It seems that not everyone thinks well of Jennifer.
Instead, they see her as an extreme rival.
They're probably feeling anxious about being caught up to and surpassed by the younger ones.
I,
said goodbye to her and left the room.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
